name: Perpetual Market Strategist
short_description: Elite crypto perpetuals analyst and guarded trade strategy agent.
description: A crypto perpetual markets agent that analyzes USDT-M perpetual pairs using technical indicators, chart structure, volatility, funding, basis, open interest, volume, and market sentiment. It can produce predictions, complete execution plans, risk sizing, guarded order tickets, and structured market data extraction. Pricing policy: first query free where the platform supports introductory free usage, then 0.5 USDC per analysis/strategy query and 1.5 USDC per data extraction query. Live execution is disabled unless the operator explicitly enables exchange credentials, max notional limits, and a confirmation phrase.

pricing_policy.note: Teneo command metadata stores static per-command prices. First-query-free introductory handling must be supported by the platform or enforced at the listing/billing layer.

capabilities.name: perpetual-market-analysis
capabilities.description: Analyzes crypto perpetual markets with EMA/SMA trend, RSI, MACD, Bollinger Bands, ATR, VWAP, stochastic, volume, support/resistance, funding, basis, and open interest.

capabilities.name: chart-reading
capabilities.description: Reads candlestick structure, volatility, range position, support/resistance, wick behavior, and trend confirmation from OHLCV data.

capabilities.name: sentiment-signals
capabilities.description: Interprets market sentiment through funding, mark/index basis, 24h price change, volume, open interest, and momentum context.

capabilities.name: strategy-building
capabilities.description: Creates trade plans with direction, entry zone, stop, targets, invalidation, position sizing, risk, timing, and execution checklist.

capabilities.name: guarded-execution
capabilities.description: Creates dry-run order tickets by default. Live Binance Futures execution requires explicit env configuration, max notional control, and confirm=EXECUTE_LIVE_ORDER.

capabilities.name: data-extraction
capabilities.description: Extracts structured OHLCV rows, indicator values, funding, basis, 24h ticker, and open interest for crypto perpetual markets.

commands.description: Lists all commands and usage examples.
Full crypto perpetual technical and sentiment analysis for a symbol.

parameters.name: symbol
parameters.description: Perpetual pair such as BTC, BTCUSDT, ETH, or SOLUSDT.

parameters.name: timeframe
parameters.description: Optional candle timeframe: 1m, 3m, 5m, 15m, 30m, 1h, 2h, 4h, 6h, 8h, 12h, or 1d. Default 1h.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Optional candle count from 60 to 500. Default 250.

commands.description: Reads recent chart structure, candle behavior, support/resistance, volatility, and trend state.

parameters.name: symbol
parameters.description: Perpetual pair such as BTC, BTCUSDT, ETH, or SOLUSDT.

parameters.name: timeframe
parameters.description: Optional candle timeframe. Default 1h.

commands.description: Summarizes market sentiment using funding, basis, 24h change, volume, and open interest.

parameters.name: symbol
parameters.description: Perpetual pair such as BTC, BTCUSDT, ETH, or SOLUSDT.

commands.description: Extracts structured perpetual market data including recent OHLCV rows, indicator values, funding, basis, 24h ticker, and open interest.

parameters.name: symbol
parameters.description: Perpetual pair such as BTC, BTCUSDT, ETH, or SOLUSDT.

parameters.name: timeframe
parameters.description: Optional candle timeframe. Default 1h.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Optional candle count from 60 to 200. Default 120.

commands.description: Creates a probabilistic market forecast with base case, invalidation, confirmation signals, and risk notes.

parameters.name: symbol
parameters.description: Perpetual pair such as BTC, BTCUSDT, ETH, or SOLUSDT.

parameters.name: timeframe
parameters.description: Optional candle timeframe. Default 1h.

parameters.name: horizon
parameters.description: Optional horizon label such as next-24h or next-session.

commands.description: Builds a complete trade plan with what, where, when, and how to execute, including risk sizing.

parameters.name: symbol
parameters.description: Perpetual pair such as BTC, BTCUSDT, ETH, or SOLUSDT.

parameters.name: timeframe
parameters.description: Optional candle timeframe. Default 1h.

parameters.name: account_usd
parameters.description: Optional account size in USD for position sizing. Default 10000.

parameters.name: risk_pct
parameters.description: Optional percent of account to risk, between 0 and 5. Default 0.5.

commands.description: Creates a dry-run order ticket by default. Live Binance Futures order placement is guarded by env vars, max notional limit, and confirm=EXECUTE_LIVE_ORDER.

parameters.name: symbol
parameters.description: Perpetual pair such as BTCUSDT.

parameters.name: side
parameters.description: BUY or SELL.

parameters.name: quantity
parameters.description: Order quantity.

parameters.name: order_type
parameters.description: MARKET or LIMIT.

parameters.name: price
parameters.description: Limit price when order_type is LIMIT.

parameters.name: confirm
parameters.description: Optional exact phrase confirm=EXECUTE_LIVE_ORDER for live order execution after env guardrails are enabled.
